subject: Tapu Lele, the Alolan island guardian deity of Akala Island — a pink and white fairy-type creature with a shell-like lower body and delicate upper form
description: A pink and white creature with a fairy-like upper form and a curved shell encasing its lower body hovers in a soft, sparkly field. The creature's form is delicate and translucent at the extremities, with flowing elements suggesting gentle motion. The background is luminous pink and white with scattered glittering particles — a signature holofoil rendering that enhances the divine, otherworldly quality of the guardian deity. The overall composition is centered and floating.
foreground: Pink and white fairy creature with shell lower body
background: Glittering pink and white sparkle field
